hero.title: Smart Expense Management
hero.subtitle: AI-powered expense tracking, multi-level approvals, and real-time analytics — all in one platform.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: From submission to payment, Expenso automates every step of the expense lifecycle.

ai.title: AI-Powered Analysis
ai.description: Five specialized AI roles analyze risk, generate summaries, detect duplicates, and provide real-time assistance.

workflow.title: Smart Approval Workflow
workflow.description: Multi-level approvals with configurable policies, SLA tracking, business hours calculation, and auto-escalation.

payments.title: Payment Integration
payments.description: Process payments via Revolut, PIX, or Payroll with batch operations, retry logic, and webhook notifications.

dashboards.title: Real-time Dashboards
dashboards.description: Interactive charts, KPI cards, and AI-generated strategic insights to monitor spending trends across departments.

compliance.title: LGPD/GDPR Compliance
compliance.description: Built-in data export, account anonymization, automated retention policies, and complete audit trails.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: MFA/2FA authentication, role-based access control, rate limiting, encrypted credentials, and security headers.

aiHighlight.title: Five AI Roles Working for You
aiHighlight.subtitle: Powered by Claude, Expenso's AI engine handles analysis, assistance, writing, strategy, and conversation.

analyst.title: Analyst
analyst.description: Automated risk scoring and duplicate detection

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps from submission to payment.

step1.title: Submit
step1.description: Create an expense request with AI-assisted form completion.

step2.title: Analyze
step2.description: AI analyzes risk, detects duplicates, and checks policy compliance.

step3.title: Approve
step3.description: Multi-level approval with SLA tracking and automatic escalation.

step4.title: Pay
step4.description: Batch payment processing via Revolut, PIX, or Payroll.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Expense Management?
cta.subtitle: Join teams that are saving time and reducing errors with AI-powered automation.
